title: Self-Evolution: AutoHarness-Inspired Closed-Loop Improvement
acceptance_criteria: EvidenceAnalyzer service reads historical run data and produces pattern summaries
within_boundaries connects deviation detection to gate evaluation
Evidence context is injected into Scoper and ReadinessChecker LLM prompts
HarnessSynthesizer generates candidate compliance rules from failure patterns
Rule Validator back-tests candidates and auto-merges surviving rules
Prompt Evolver maintains versioned prompts and A/B tests variants
Plan Strategy Evolver generates scoper hints from historical outcomes
Policy Distiller encodes routine tasks as deterministic code (long-term)
constraints: Phases are sequential: Phase 1 before Phase 2 before Phase 3
No new required dependencies; LLM calls via existing LiteLLMPlannerAdapter
All auto-generated rules and prompt variants must be human-reviewable
